title: Tiny Dragon
bio: Brindle Puffscale is a tiny dragon who hoards warm socks instead of gold. He feels proud, sneezes smoke rings, and keeps one button treasure under his wing.

steps.title: Base Shapes
steps.instruction: On the Guides layer, draw a small oval body and a round head. Add a curved tail and two tiny oval feet.
steps.hint: Use simple blob shapes first; the dragon details come later.

steps.title: Face Placement
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, place two oval eyes on the head. Add proud angled eyebrows, a tiny smile, and two small nostril dots.
steps.hint: Lift one eyebrow a little higher to make Brindle look proud.

steps.title: Personality Details
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, add small horns, rounded wings, back spikes, smoke rings, and a button treasure near one foot.
steps.hint: Draw the wings like little teardrops so they stay beginner-friendly.

steps.title: Clean Lineart
steps.instruction: On the Lineart layer, trace the head, body, tail, wings, feet, face, horns, spikes, smoke rings, and button.
steps.hint: Keep the spikes small and rounded so the dragon stays cute, not sharp.

steps.title: Color & Details
steps.instruction: On the Color + Details layer, fill the dragon, wings, horns, cheeks, and button. Add soft shadow under the body and small belly dots.
steps.hint: Use a few accent dots instead of many scales to keep it simple.
